papers.title: Tabular Foundation Models Are Competitive Cellular Perturbation Predictors Across Biological Scales

papers.title: A refined Saccharomyces cerevisiae reference transcriptome from Direct RNA Sequencing, with a reusable pipeline for UTR annotation updates

papers.title: Decoding RNA N6-Methyladenosine Methylome of Wheat Using Machine Learning and Nanopore Direct RNA Sequencing.

papers.title: DeepMethylation: A deep learning framework for tissue-specific DNA methylation prediction and functional variant annotation.

papers.title: An Explainable Deep Learning Framework Integrating DNA Sequence and Transcription Initiation Signals for Gene Expression Prediction.

papers.title: High-throughput Profiling of Pseudouridines in Microbiome-derived Bacterial RNA.

papers.title: scMapNet: Marker-based cell type annotation of scRNA-seq data via vision transfer learning with tabular-to-image transformations.

papers.title: Homology-aware cross-validation strategies for generalization assessment in RNA structure prediction

papers.title: Peptide:MHC Binding Stability Prediction Using Protein Language Models

papers.title: Tranquillyzer: A Neural Network Framework for Long-read Annotation and Demultiplexing.

papers.title: Evaluation of Dorado v5.2.0 de novo basecalling models for the detection of tRNA modifications using RNA004 chemistry.

papers.relevance_cn: 拓展DRS在单等位基因分辨率修饰检测中的应用，深化对表观转录组异质性的理解。

papers.title: SpliceSelectNet: a hierarchical Transformer-based deep learning model for splice site prediction.
papers.summary_cn: 基于层次化Transformer的剪接位点预测模型。
papers.relevance_cn: 利用深度学习解决经典生信问题，为RNA结构预测和变异分析提供工具。

papers.title: Condition-Associated Pattern Extraction and Recovery From Multi-Condition Single-Cell RNA-seq Data With CAPER.
papers.summary_cn: 从多条件scRNA-seq数据中提取和恢复条件关联模式。
papers.relevance_cn: 利用AI处理单细胞数据，揭示细胞状态转换机制，具有生物学应用价值。

papers.title: DeepGEP: Deep learning for gene expression prediction from multi-omics in mammals.
papers.summary_cn: 基于多组学数据的深度学习基因表达预测模型。
papers.relevance_cn: 展示AI在整合多模态组学数据预测生物学表型方面的能力，具有方法论参考价值。

papers.title: ModiCal: A Targeted Calibration Workflow for Site-Specific m(5)C Validation by Nanopore Direct RNA Sequencing.
papers.summary_cn: 针对m5C的定点校准工作流，提升Nanopore DRS检测的准确性与可靠性。
papers.relevance_cn: 解决m5C检测中的假阳性问题，是DRS修饰检测流程中的重要工具。

papers.title: A universal deep learning framework for empowering nanopore identification by reinforcing temporal signals.
papers.summary_cn: 强化时序信号的通用深度学习框架，提升Nanopore信号识别性能。
papers.relevance_cn: 直接应用于Nanopore basecalling和modification calling，提升信号处理精度。

papers.title: NanoSimFormer: an end-to-end Transformer-based nanopore signal simulator with basecaller guidance.
papers.summary_cn: 基于Transformer的端到端纳米孔信号模拟器，引入basecaller引导，提升模拟真实度。
papers.relevance_cn: 为DRS信号处理和modification calling提供高质量模拟数据，加速算法开发与评测。

papers.title: Single-Cell RNA Editing Identifies T Cell ADAR1 as a Key Regulator of Immune Exhaustion and Anti-PD-1 Resistance in Colorectal Cancer.
papers.summary_cn: 单细胞RNA编辑分析揭示T细胞ADAR1驱动免疫耗竭和抗PD-1耐受。
papers.relevance_cn: 体现RNA编辑在肿瘤免疫单细胞解析中的价值。
